Work With Us

Build Your Career in
IT Infrastructure

Nuvextro offers opportunities for experienced IT professionals to work on advanced infrastructure, cloud, and cybersecurity projects. Join a team focused on excellence and innovation.

Why Join Nuvextro

A growth-focused environment

Enterprise Projects

Work on high-impact infrastructure transformations for global enterprise clients.

Continuous Growth

Develop your skills with access to the latest technologies and expert-led knowledge sharing.

Flexible & Dynamic

A modern work environment designed for professionals who value results and agility.

Our Expertise

Roles we're looking for

We are always looking for certified, experienced professionals across infrastructure and cloud disciplines.

VMware Specialists

vSphere, vSAN, NSX-T certified engineers for virtualization projects.

Cloud Architects

AWS, Azure, GCP certified professionals for cloud deployments and migrations.

Kubernetes Engineers

Platform engineers with container orchestration and GitOps expertise.

Security Specialists

Cybersecurity professionals with CISSP, CISM, or equivalent certifications.

Network Engineers

CCIE/CCNP-level engineers for enterprise network design and deployment.

DevOps & Automation

Infrastructure automation, CI/CD, and IaC specialists (Terraform, Ansible).

Apply Now

Join the team

Tell us about your expertise and we'll be in touch to discuss potential opportunities.
